title: Ulti Tool Media & SFLLUX NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
content:
Ulti Tool Media & SFLLUX NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made effective as of [Insert Date] by and between Ulti Tool Media, a [Insert Legal Form, e.g., LLC, Corporation] with its principal place of business located at [Insert Address], herein referred to as "Disclosing Party", and SFLLUX, a [Insert Legal Form, e.g., LLC, Corporation] with its principal place of business located at [Insert Address], herein referred to as "Receiving Party".

WHEREAS the Disclosing Party possesses certain ideas and information relating to marketing strategies that is confidential and proprietary to the Disclosing Party ("Confidential Information"); and

WHEREAS the Receiving Party desires to receive disclosure of such Confidential Information for the purpose of evaluating potential business engagements with the Disclosing Party;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements herein contained, the parties hereto agree as follows:

1. Definition of Confidential Information
context: From document: Ulti Tool Media & SFLLUX NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT — chunk 1 (chunk 1/5)
